scripts.build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'www') { Remove-Item 'www\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'www' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\index.html' 'www\index.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\styles.css' 'www\styles.css' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\app.js' 'www\app.js' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\manifest.webmanifest' 'www\manifest.webmanifest' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\sw.js' 'www\sw.js' -Force; if (Test-Path 'mobile_web\assets') { Copy-Item 'mobile_web\assets' 'www\assets' -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.copy:web: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'www') { Remove-Item 'www\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'www' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\index.html' 'www\index.html' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\styles.css' 'www\styles.css' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\app.js' 'www\app.js' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\manifest.webmanifest' 'www\manifest.webmanifest' -Force; Copy-Item 'mobile_web\sw.js' 'www\sw.js' -Force; if (Test-Path 'mobile_web\assets') { Copy-Item 'mobile_web\assets' 'www\assets' -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run copy:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run copy:web && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run copy:web && npx cap open ios
